title: Retsub
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Retsub''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Towards the end of [[Operation Skyhook]] the Empire began a new offensive after the completion of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]]. The ''Retsub'' was assigned to one of the first attacks, against one of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] main weapons-storage compounds.

The Alliance had, however, already gotten word of the increased Imperial activity and taken steps to protect the cache, sending three [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]], led by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], to defend it until relieved by [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron's]] R-22s.

The R-22s arrived shortly before the ''Retsub'', which immediately launched [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] to destroy the cache. The Rebels moved to intercept, destroying several Imperial fighters. Eventually, the ''Retsub'' withdrew, having only been able to destroy one R-22 and one [[Class-A cargo container|container]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
